title: Finding
description: A single diagnostic finding from a code analysis run (agency/capabilities/analyze/_main.py; Spec 042). Linked via HAS_FINDING←Analysis; severity gates downstream improvement planning.

severity.description: Severity tier: 'fail' blocks merge; 'warn' flags; 'info' is advisory.

file.description: Relative path to the source file containing the finding.

line.description: Line number where the finding occurs.

evidence.description: Optional code excerpt or additional evidence from the analyzer.
